'''lazhupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yagouarondi|yagouarondi]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-zh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yagouarondi|yagouarondi]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| lazhupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:læzhipith|læzhipith]] || [[word:læzhipij|læzhipij]] || [[word:læzhipish|læzhipish]] || [[word:læzhipi|læzhipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lazhuzhuputh|lazhuzhuputh]] || [[word:lazhuzhupuj|lazhuzhupuj]] || [[word:lazhuzhupush|lazhuzhupush]] || [[word:lazhuzhupu|lazhuzhupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lazhuputh|lazhuputh]] || [[word:lazhupuj|lazhupuj]] || [[word:lazhupush|lazhupush]] || [[word:lazhupu|lazhupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lazhufputh|lazhufputh]] || [[word:lazhufpuj|lazhufpuj]] || [[word:lazhufpush|lazhufpush]] || [[word:lazhufpuf|lazhufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lazhuputhu|lazhuputhu]] || [[word:lazhupuju|lazhupuju]] || [[word:lazhupushu|lazhupushu]] || [[word:lazhupuku|lazhupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lazhuputh|lazhuputh]] || [[word:lazhupuj|lazhupuj]] || [[word:lazhupush|lazhupush]] || [[word:lazhupu|lazhupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lazhuputhul|lazhuputhul]] || [[word:lazhupujul|lazhupujul]] || [[word:lazhupushul|lazhupushul]] || [[word:lazhupukul|lazhupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lazhuputhuthu|lazhuputhuthu]] || [[word:lazhupujuju|lazhupujuju]] || [[word:lazhupushushu|lazhupushushu]] || [[word:lazhupuku|lazhupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lazhuputhun|lazhuputhun]] || [[word:lazhupujun|lazhupujun]] || [[word:lazhupushun|lazhupushun]] || [[word:lazhupukun|lazhupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lazhuputhuoro|lazhuputhuoro]] || [[word:lazhupujuoro|lazhupujuoro]] || [[word:lazhupushuoro|lazhupushuoro]] || [[word:lazhupukuoro|lazhupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
